metadata.claim_text: Obtain appropriate hand/wrist imaging for scaphoid fracture and explicitly comment on articular alignment and adjacent joint stability.
Shared hand-wrist anatomy (scaphoid, scapholunate-ligament, radius) links Scaphoid Fracture to adjacent Prepare neighborhoods in the cluster graph.
Treating scaphoid fracture in isolation without checking related wrist, tendon, or nerve neighborhoods in the cluster.
Document neurovascular status, key anatomic structures (scaphoid, scapholunate-ligament, radius), stability assessment, and escalation plan for scaphoid fracture.
Missing scaphoid assessment in scaphoid fracture is a common board and OITE trap.
Early protected motion and therapy goals for scaphoid fracture should align with tendon, ligament, and joint stability constraints.
